queries.question: How many released and planned seasons of mystery sci-fi are there?
queries.sql: Select Released_Seasons, Planned_Seasons From TV_Shows Where Series = 'Mystery Sci-Fi'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?released_seasons ?planned_seasons WHERE {
  ?tv_shows a :TV_Shows .
  ?tv_shows p:Released_Seasons ?released_seasons .
  ?tv_shows p:Planned_Seasons ?planned_seasons .
  ?tv_shows p:Series ?series_f .
  FILTER(STR(?series_f) = STR("Mystery Sci-Fi"))
}

queries.question: Who has the highest number of tv seasons ordered by most to least
queries.sql: Select * From TV_Shows Order by Released_Seasons DESC
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): SELECT * expanded to TV_Shows columns (no LIMIT -> ORDER BY irrelevant to row-se

queries.question: Who has the highest number of tv seasons ordered by most to least
queries.sql: Select * From TV_Shows Order by Planned_Seasons DESC

queries.question: Who has the highest number of tv seasons ordered by most to least
queries.sql: Select * From TV_Shows Order by Released_Seasons, Planned_Seasons DESC

queries.question: For mystery sci-fi, how many seasons were planned?
queries.sql: Select Planned_Seasons From TV_Shows Where Series = 'Mystery Sci-Fi'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?planned_seasons WHERE {
  ?tv_shows a :TV_Shows .
  ?tv_shows p:Planned_Seasons ?planned_seasons .
  ?tv_shows p:Series ?series_f .
  FILTER(STR(?series_f) = STR("Mystery Sci-Fi"))
}
